site_metadata.name: Dimitris Vatistas
site_metadata.title: Web Developer & Web Designer
site_metadata.description: Dimitris Vatistas is a web developer and designer crafting high-performance digital products. Specializing in React, Next.js, and futuristic UI/UX design.

personal_info.bio: I'm Dimitris Vatistas, a developer and designer crafting digital products that balance aesthetics with functionality. My work spans the full creative and technical process — from wireframing in Figma and prototyping in Framer, to building production-ready applications in React and Next.js.

experience.description: Mastered Python fundamentals and software engineering principles through Stanford's intensive online course.
Focusing on advanced mathematics, with a long-term goal of pursuing studies in Architecture.
Founded and led a digital loyalty startup, overseeing product strategy and full-stack development.
Built secure, privacy-focused age verification systems using machine learning models.

projects.title: AI Age Verification
projects.description: A secure, privacy-first system for frictionless AI-based age verification.

projects.title: QRoyal
projects.description: A smart digital loyalty program that replaces physical cards with one universal QR-based pass.

projects.title: Fortnite Vibe Coder
projects.description: A playful project that codes custom Fortnite-inspired 'vibes' into experiences.

projects.title: ImageFM
projects.description: A creative AI platform that generates images from user prompts with a music-inspired twist.

projects.title: GenGlow
projects.description: An AI-powered platform that generates personalized skincare routines based on user preferences and skin profiles.
